name: The Great Old One
description: Your patron is a distant cosmic entity with alien thoughts and psychic influence.

1.name: Awakened Mind
1.description: You can telepathically speak to creatures you can see within range.

1.name: Expanded Spell List
1.description: The Great Old One adds spells to your warlock options.

6.name: Entropic Ward
6.description: Impose disadvantage on an attack against you, then gain advantage on your next attack against that creature.

10.name: Thought Shield
10.description: Your thoughts can't be read, and psychic damage against you is reduced and reflected.

14.name: Create Thrall
14.description: Charm a humanoid indefinitely until the effect is broken.
